description: Golden Dataset for Objective 2 (thesis paper, Section 3.2.1). Forty standardized academic queries spanning the five CCSICT tracks plus cross-track and negative-control items. Every ground_truth answer must be derived directly from the archived CCSICT thesis corpus and validated by a panel of three CCSICT faculty members before serving as the absolute mathematical benchmark for the Ragas evaluation.

workflow: 1. Ingest the full 50-thesis corpus into the system.
2. For each query, the researchers draft a ground_truth answer strictly from the archived manuscripts and record the exact source thesis (title, authors, year).
3. Queries marked query_type=negative_control must be checked against the corpus; if no thesis covers the topic, the ground_truth states that explicitly.
4. Each of the three faculty panel members reviews every ground_truth against the corpus and signs off below.
5. Set validated_by_faculty_panel to true only after all three sign-offs. run_comparison.py warns until then.

queries.question: What CCSICT theses have applied Retrieval-Augmented Generation to institutional data?
queries.ground_truth: REPLACE: faculty-verified answer derived from the archived corpus.
queries.source_thesis: REPLACE: exact thesis title, authors, and year.

queries.ground_truth: REPLACE: faculty-verified answer derived from the archived corpus.
